heroHeadline: Global Fusion Race Advances as Governments Accelerate Investment
heroSubtitle: From NIF's ignition breakthrough and EAST's 1,066-second plasma record to the UK's £1.3B National Fusion Strategy and ARPA-E's $135M commitment, the race to commercial fusion energy is accelerating at the government level even as private sector investment moderates.
footerNote: Data sourced from DOE/LLNL, ITER Organization, ARPA-E, UK Government, peer-reviewed journals (Nature, Physical Review Letters), and the Fusion Industry Association. All milestones independently verified.
